hada13fd1gbceag4aa8g87e0gbc4321de30f5: It's done. The path is clear. My fate - our fates - can begin.
h5f7a099fg40f0g4999g9b6fg54bf795904b0: But the blood of those who fell today ran as pure as any hero's - so I call us by another name.
he4fe5b17g0fa5g4d4ag9f4egcc30aca788b8: We are survivors. We are family. The road to Baldur's Gate is a long one yet.
h5f5eddcag5cd7g415agaa2bg04d621c0de59: But you have earned every stride so far. Make your preparations - we leave as soon as we're able.
hb9de5e6cg16aag4ec4g83f8gda91d00fcbf8: You. I don't know if you were sent here by gods, or fate, or sheer bloody luck.
had25131ag04e5g4c16g80abgacc59600f415: I don't care. You were a friend when we needed it, and we won't forget that.
hf11532e4g2e01g431egbb5cg27f14cff628d: Should you ever need it, you have family in Baldur's Gate.
h712e3e59g0f7dg4b10g9f53g9373eae01aeb: But we need not speak of departures just yet. We have time - the road is clear.
hf2607341gb609g4497gbbe3g1ce772626ea3: And I, for one, could use a bloody drink. We'll join your camp tonight, if you'll have us.
heb6a953fg4d78g4d91ga256gbd78b16fd921: By all the watching gods... that's Halsin.
hd3f22429g1ce9g4cf0g98f4g91edf3df3116: He'll have some hard words for Kagha, I expect.
habbee799ga809g42f2ga47dg9960babd3e17: Go speak to him. You're the reason he has a grove to return to at all. We'll be here when you're ready to travel.
h75504494g99f1g42c8g91e4gafed4c7cda8e: Go! Speak to him. Return when you wish to travel to your camp. We have twice the reason to celebrate.
h491f7383g252fg4c1cg8a8ag74faf6326943: That's... that's the last of them. Tymora smile on me... they're dead.
hf0b48c05g7558g49c0g9712g21347e509a2e: We did it! Watching gods, you did it.
